PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Continued To Jul-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Moll for Evelyn Wells (Petitioner), and Specially appearaing for Richard Canatella representing Henry Stevens.

Mr. Moll stated that there was a will, but the only asset was a property located at 155 Vernon street which was in joint tenancy, which came out to 1/7 interest. In addition, he reported that Mr. Canatella agreed to having Ms. Wells appointed as Special Administrator, (petition will be filed Ex-Parte).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

The matter was continued to April 29, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. (not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Continued To Nov-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Moll appearing for petitioner. Ronald Toran appearing for and with objector Henry Stevens. Mr. Moll has filed a partition action. If the objector is right, there may not be anything in the estate. Counsel is requesting for continuance to start discovery. Matter is continued to 11/14.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
